title: Scumbag System Episode 9 Subbed
description: Shen Yuan's ordinary youth was originally a reader of the cultivation novel "Proud Immortal Way", triggered by the activation code after reading the book Mysterious System, which caused him to enter the body of the savage villain Shen Qingqiu in the world in the book "Proud Immortal Way. To change the fate of garbage villain Shen Qingqiu when his disciple Luo Binghe finally reveals his real face, he is crushed and dies, and he begins a long road....
